text.title: Microservices Service Boundaries Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping boundary signal to a sovereignty rule.

decision-tree.root-question: What does the current architecture look like?

conclusion.verdict: run event-storming; identify bounded contexts; cut along them
extract each service's data; use CDC for replicas
register contracts in schema registry; wire CI compatibility checks
split service along contexts OR formally reassign single ownership
replace 2PC with saga or relocate to one service

text.example: state=monolith → run event-storming → cut into 5 bounded contexts.
